sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13926" key="a)posfai/risis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποσφαίρ-ισις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13926.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throwing off, flinging as a ball,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
